meta.title: AI Tools Research — Video and Image Production Stack
meta.research_method: Live web search — official documentation + third-party verification
meta.purpose: Evaluate all candidate AI tools for Jasmine content pipeline across 8 content types — VIDEO and IMAGE only
meta.scope_note: AUDIO IS SOLVED — ElevenLabs is the confirmed and locked audio solution for all voice, narration, and emotion tagging. This document covers VIDEO GENERATION and IMAGE GENERATION only. Tools are not evaluated on audio capability.

audio_voice.use: All voice cloning, narration, talking head audio, emotion tags ([excited], [soft], [whispering], [energetic])

key_findings_summary: AUDIO CONFIRMED — ElevenLabs handles all audio. Not under evaluation.
Tensor.art went fully SFW in 2025 — drop it
Higgsfield hosts Wan 2.6 which is near-uncensored — web-based NSFW video without local GPU
Wan AI is now on v2.7 (not 2.2 as previously documented)
Google Imagen 3 confirmed as the Google image generation model — no LoRA support, SFW only
Your Google One = AI Pro tier = Veo 2 + Veo 3.1 Fast only (not full Veo 3)
Full Veo 3 requires Google AI Ultra at $249/month — not justified at current stage
Seedance 2 now accessible via CapCut internationally + fal.ai API (April 2026)
FaceFusion now on v3.5 — NSFW filter bypassable via one config flag
MuseTalk retained — its role is VIDEO lip sync (mouth movement), with ElevenLabs audio as the input

tools.name: Wan AI
tools.what_it_does: Open-source video generation model family. Supports T2V, I2V, image generation, video editing, and audio-video joint generation. Version 2.7 added Thinking Mode for improved prompt understanding.

capabilities.image_generation_notes: Text-to-image and image-to-image included on platform
capabilities.lora_notes: Full LoRA support via ComfyUI or local training. Hosted platform does not support custom LoRA.

nsfw.hosted_notes: Terms of Service explicitly prohibit sexually explicit or suggestive content. API is also censored.
nsfw.local_notes: Wan 2.1 through 2.7 weights are freely downloadable. No built-in content filter. Running locally via ComfyUI bypasses all restrictions. NSFW LoRAs confirmed working for explicit video generation. Most capable open-source NSFW video pipeline currently available.
nsfw.verdict: Local deployment only for NSFW. Hosted for SFW production use.

pricing.credits_addon: $1.50 per 30 credits up to $100 per 3900 credits

tools.verdict_notes: Core video generation tool for the pipeline. Hosted at $5/mo for SFW production. Local weights for NSFW via ComfyUI on RunPod. Upgrade to 2.7 from 2.2 in all documentation.

tools.name: Meta AI
tools.what_it_does: Meta's consumer AI assistant integrated into Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp, and Messenger. Includes basic image generation (Imagine with Meta AI) built on Meta's own foundation models.

capabilities.image_generation_notes: Basic image generation only. No LoRA, no custom models, no character consistency mechanism.
capabilities.video_generation_notes: Movie Gen research model exists but is not consumer-accessible.

nsfw.hosted_notes: Meta policy prohibits nude, intimate, or sexually suggestive imagery. No age-verify toggle. No paid tier unlocks NSFW. Further tightened in Q2 2026 following regulatory pressure.
nsfw.verdict: Fully blocked — no path to NSFW, no unlock available

pricing.free: Bundled with Meta apps and meta.ai — no paid tier

tools.verdict_notes: No custom models, no LoRA, no video, fully blocked NSFW. Unusable for this pipeline beyond quick SFW concept tests.

tools.name: Google Veo 3 / Google Flow
tools.what_it_does: Veo 3 is Google's flagship video generation model — the first to natively generate audio (sound effects, ambient noise, dialogue) alongside video. Google Flow is the filmmaking interface that combines Veo, Imagen 3, and Gemini into a single pipeline.

capabilities.video_generation_notes: Accurate lip sync, physics, cinematography controls. Can persist cast, locations, and style as story assets across shots.
capabilities.lip_sync_notes: Native audio-video joint generation — not post-production lip sync
capabilities.lora_notes: No custom model fine-tuning for end users
capabilities.motion_notes: Camera movement and shot type control

google_one_ai_pro.note: This is what the user currently has via Google One

google_ai_ultra.credits: ~25000 AI credits/month, ~500 Veo 3 video clips/month at 50 credits each
google_ai_ultra.note: Required for full Veo 3 capability — NOT included in current Google One plan

nsfw.hosted_notes: Google Responsible AI guidelines block explicit sexual content across all consumer products. Vertex AI can configure safety filter thresholds for violence/sensitivity categories but explicit sexual content remains blocked regardless.

pricing.current_user_access: Google AI Pro via Google One — Veo 2 + Veo 3.1 Fast

tools.verdict_notes: Outstanding quality for SFW cinematic video. Audio generation is unique. The user's existing Google One gives access to Veo 3.1 Fast — use for lifestyle/travel/fashion B-roll (Content Type 5). Full Veo 3 at $250/mo is not justified at current stage.

tools.name: Google Imagen 3
tools.what_it_does: Google's state-of-the-art text-to-image model. Available in Gemini app, Google AI Studio (Gemini API), and Vertex AI. Produces photorealistic images with strong detail and lighting.
tools.note: This is the 'Google image generation model' referenced in the research brief

capabilities.image_generation_notes: Photorealistic images, strong prompt adherence. No LoRA or custom model support — fully closed system.
capabilities.lora_notes: Vertex AI supports model customization but not LoRA injection. No fine-tuning available to consumer users.

nsfw.hosted_notes: Safety filters cover sexual content, violence, derogatory content. Vertex AI person_generation setting controls photorealism of people (not explicit content). Explicit sexual content blocked regardless of any safety setting.

pricing.gemini_app: Free with limits for US users

tools.verdict_notes: Excellent photorealism at $0.03/image. No LoRA = no character consistency for Jasmine. Use only for occasional SFW backgrounds, location shots, or mood boards where exact Jasmine identity is not required.

tools.name: Higgsfield AI
tools.what_it_does: Multi-model AI video and image generation platform. Acts as an aggregator — integrates Wan 2.6+, Seedream 4.0, Kling 3.0, Veo 3.1, Sora 2, and their own Higgsfield Soul model. Specialises in face swap, character swap, body swap, and motion transfer.

capabilities.image_generation_notes: Via Seedream 4.0 (ByteDance) integration — uncensored on this platform unlike ByteDance's own apps
capabilities.video_generation_notes: 8000+ motion templates. Multi-model: choose Wan 2.6, Kling 3.0, Sora 2, Veo 3.1 per generation.
capabilities.face_swap_notes: Face swap, head swap, full character/body swap — production-grade
capabilities.lora_notes: No custom LoRA upload — uses their integrated model stack

nsfw_breakdown.wan_2_6_model: near_uncensored — confirmed by multiple independent sources
nsfw_breakdown.seedream_4_model: uncensored — unique to Higgsfield, not available on ByteDance own apps
nsfw_breakdown.higgsfield_soul_model: allows NSFW reference photo uploads, no explicit text prompting

nsfw.hosted_notes: Each integrated model applies its own content filter independently. Wan 2.6 and Seedream 4.0 on this platform are the NSFW-capable routes. No local weights required — web-based.
nsfw.verdict: Age-verify toggle / model-dependent. Wan 2.6 = near-uncensored web NSFW video. This is the key finding.

tools.verdict_notes: Biggest sleeper pick in this stack. Wan 2.6 being uncensored on this platform provides web-based NSFW video without any local GPU setup at $9/month. Face swap + character swap capabilities are production-grade. Multi-model aggregation is unique value. Credit burn rate for high-volume production is the main constraint.

tools.name: Tensor.art
tools.what_it_does: Cloud-based AI image generation platform using Stable Diffusion and FLUX models. Previously a major hub for LoRA model hosting and NSFW art generation.

capabilities.lora_notes: Supports LoRA upload and use — but only for SFW content now

nsfw.hosted_notes: Tensor.art transitioned to fully SFW platform in 2025. All NSFW content removed from public visibility and generation. Policy states: 'Any content depicting explicit sexual acts, nudity, or pornographic material is not permitted for public visibility and generation.' Change was forced by credit card processor and regulatory requirements.
nsfw.verdict: Fully blocked — major policy reversal in 2025

pricing.note: Credit/subscription model — details changed with SFW transition

tools.verdict_notes: The SFW policy change in 2025 removes its primary value for this use case. The LoRA infrastructure that made it valuable for NSFW character generation is now useless. Use Civitai for model discovery and local ComfyUI for NSFW generation instead.

tools.name: Civitai
tools.what_it_does: The dominant open-source AI model hub for Stable Diffusion, FLUX, and related checkpoints, LoRAs, embeddings, and workflows. Also has on-site image generator using community models. Central repository for the entire open-source image generation ecosystem.

capabilities.image_generation_notes: On-site generator using community models. LoRA and checkpoint upload/use is core offering. Massive model library.
capabilities.lora_notes: LoRA upload, hosting, and generation is the primary function. Download LoRAs for local use.

nsfw.hosted_notes: Still allows X and XXX content (graphic nudity, sexual acts) with age verification toggle. Newly banned in 2025: incest, self-harm, diaper/excretion content, non-consensual scenarios. Celebrity/real person content hidden when NSFW browsing enabled. BYOI (Bring Your Own Image) requires minimum 50% denoising. Stability AI models blocked from generating explicit content (July 31, 2025). Payment: shifted to crypto-only for NSFW generation credits as of May 2025 — credit card processors withdrew.
nsfw.local_notes: Downloaded models run locally with zero restrictions
nsfw.verdict: Allowed with age verification. Crypto payment required for on-site NSFW generation. Download models for local use to avoid payment friction.

pricing.on_site_generation: Buzz credits system — crypto payment for NSFW generation (post May 2025)
pricing.note: Primary value is model download, not on-site generation

tools.verdict_notes: Irreplaceable as a model hub. Primary use: discover and download community LoRAs (including NSFW character LoRAs for Jasmine), download base model checkpoints, upload and share the trained Jasmine LoRA. On-site generation is secondary. Crypto payment friction for NSFW generation — work around by downloading to local ComfyUI.

tools.name: Mage.space
tools.what_it_does: Web-based AI image and video generator. Known for permissive content policies and anonymous access. Supports multiple models including FLUX and Stable Diffusion variants.

capabilities.video_generation_notes: Available on Pro ($30/mo) and above tiers
capabilities.lora_notes: Custom model import mentioned at Pro Plus tier ($60/mo) — not confirmed for LoRA specifically

nsfw.hosted_notes: Platform allows creative freedom within stated boundaries. NSFW content permitted as long as it does not depict real persons, violate copyright, or involve minors. Following 2023 investigation into non-consensual deepfakes, celebrity/real-person generation was restricted. Anonymous/no-login adult generation appears available on free tier. No explicit age-verify toggle documented in 2025 — filter appears to be in settings.
nsfw.verdict: Allowed within limits — no real persons. Good for anonymous SFW/softcore testing.

pricing.free: $0/month — daily generation limit, no login required
pricing.pro_plus: $60/month — premium video models, 4K enhancement, custom model import

tools.verdict_notes: Good for quick anonymous testing. No-login free tier is useful for iteration. Not suitable for building consistent Jasmine identity (no reliable LoRA system confirmed). Use as secondary/overflow tool for SFW and softcore static images.

tools.name: Seedance 2.0
tools.what_it_does: ByteDance's flagship multimodal video generation model. Supports text, image, audio, and video inputs simultaneously. Up to 9 reference images, 3 video clips, 3 audio clips per generation. Native audio-video joint generation. Director-level control over lighting, shadows, and camera movement.

capabilities.video_generation_notes: Cinematic quality with motion stability. Director-level camera control. Timeline-based prompting per segment.
capabilities.lip_sync_notes: Via audio-driven generation — not a standalone lip sync tool

access.capcut: Available via CapCut app — international rollout (Brazil, Indonesia, Malaysia, Mexico, Philippines, Thailand, Vietnam)
access.api: API launched April 2, 2026 via fal.ai and Hypereal AI
access.note: ByteDance has paused global direct launch — CapCut is primary access point

nsfw.hosted_notes: ByteDance applies strict content moderation. Banned: explicit sexual material, violence, real-person deepfakes without authorization. Real-person voice cloning suspended February 2026 due to safety concerns. Content filters are keyword-based in English — prompts in other languages have been reported to partially bypass filters (grey area, not reliable).

pricing.note: Most accessible free route is CapCut

tools.verdict_notes: Best tool for Content Type 7 (Product Review/UGC) due to multi-reference video synthesis and product handling. Also strong for Content Type 4 (GRWM/Outfit Transition). SFW only. Now accessible free via CapCut — no cost barrier.

tools.name: Viggle AI
tools.what_it_does: Character animation and face/body swap platform. Specialises in putting a character identity onto pre-existing motion templates, video remixing, and live streaming as a character. Uses JST-1 (video-3D foundation model) for full identity transfer including face, head shape, expressions, and full-body motion.

capabilities.video_generation_notes: 8000+ motion templates. 1080p HD on paid tiers.

nsfw.hosted_notes: SFW platform. No evidence of NSFW mode or adult content capability. Face swap to explicit video is not a documented feature.
nsfw.verdict: Fully blocked — SFW entertainment platform only

pricing.credit_note: 1 credit = up to 15 seconds. Rap feature = 2 credits per video

tools.verdict_notes: Strong for SFW viral content — pre-LoRA phase, map Jasmine reference image onto trending dance/motion templates. 5 free videos per day is enough for early-stage content production. Not suitable for NSFW pipeline.

tools.name: MuseTalk
tools.role_clarification: VIDEO tool, not audio. MuseTalk takes ElevenLabs audio output as input and drives mouth/lip movement on a video frame. Audio is produced by ElevenLabs — MuseTalk's only job is making the face move in sync with it.
tools.what_it_does: Open-source real-time video lip synchronization model. Takes an audio file (from ElevenLabs) and a portrait video/image, outputs a video with mouth movements synced to the audio. Runs at 30+ FPS on NVIDIA V100.

video_types: lip sync video — drives mouth movement from audio input
capabilities.lip_sync_notes: Core function. Input: ElevenLabs .mp3/.wav + portrait frame. Output: video with synced mouth movement. v1.5 improved identity consistency and sync accuracy.

tools.pipeline_position: Step 3 of talking head workflow: ElevenLabs (audio) → MuseTalk (mouth sync) → CapCut (final edit)

nsfw.local_notes: Open-source weights, no content filter. Can be applied to any video input including explicit content.
nsfw.fal_ai_api: Available as managed API on fal.ai — fal.ai TOS applies

access.local: Python 3.10+, CUDA 11.7. Weights on HuggingFace: TMElyralab/MuseTalk and kevinwang676/MuseTalk1.5
access.api: fal.ai managed API — no local GPU required

tools.verdict_notes: Essential for Content Type 3 (Talking Head). Works directly with ElevenLabs output — feed ElevenLabs .wav into MuseTalk to animate Jasmine's face. Free and open source locally. Available via fal.ai before RunPod is set up.

tools.name: FaceFusion
tools.what_it_does: Open-source next-generation face swapper and enhancer. Supports image and video face swap, face enhancement, frame enhancement. Highly configurable. Industry standard for local face swap.

capabilities.face_swap_notes: Primary function. Best-in-class quality for local face swap.

nsfw.local_notes: Version 3.5.0 includes built-in NSFW content filter. Filter is bypassable: set skip_nsfw_filter: true in config file or set nsfw_confidence_threshold to 0.95. Community fork 'facefusion-nsfw' exists on GitHub for fully unrestricted operation with no filter at all.
nsfw.bypass_method: Set skip_nsfw_filter: true in config, OR use facefusion-nsfw community fork
nsfw.verdict: Locally unrestricted with one config change

tools.verdict_notes: Core tool for Content Type 2 (Face Swap Reel). Combined with Wan AI video + MuseTalk, forms the complete local pipeline: generate → face swap → lip sync → publish. Filter easily disabled. Active development.

tools.name: Meta SeamlessExpressive
tools.scope_note: NOT a production tool. NOT relevant to video or image generation. Noted here only as a future distribution multiplier.
tools.what_it_does: Meta's AI translation and dubbing system built into Instagram and Facebook Reels. Auto-translates Reels into other languages, clones creator voice, and syncs lip movements. No use in the production pipeline — audio is handled by ElevenLabs.
tools.why_not_in_scope: Audio is solved by ElevenLabs. This tool cannot be used outside of Meta's Reels interface. It is not a standalone video or image tool.

future_use.value: Auto-dubs all Reels into Hindi, Spanish, Portuguese for free — 20% average engagement boost on dubbed content
future_use.action: Enable per Reel in creator tools — zero cost, zero production effort

tools.verdict_notes: Irrelevant to video/image production stack. Revisit as a distribution feature at 1000+ followers.

nsfw_capability_map.summary: NSFW status as of April 2026 — verified via live search

platforms.how: Download open weights, run via ComfyUI on local GPU or RunPod
Select Wan 2.6 model specifically in Higgsfield web interface
Select Seedream 4.0 in Higgsfield for image generation
Enable X/XXX content toggle, age verification, Buzz credits (crypto payment)
platforms.requirement: Age verification + crypto payment for NSFW generation credits

platforms.how: Download LoRA or checkpoint, run locally in ComfyUI
Free tier, filter toggle in settings
platforms.requirement: No real persons — fictional characters only
platforms.note: Softcore/suggestive — not confirmed for fully explicit content

platforms.how: Set skip_nsfw_filter: true in config, or use facefusion-nsfw fork

platforms.requirement: Local GPU or RunPod, or fal.ai API

platforms.how: Policy changed 2025 — previously allowed, now fully SFW

content_type_tool_mapping.note: Maps each of the 8 Jasmine content types to verified tools

types.name: Viral Clone Reel (Motion Transfer)
types.description: Download viral reel, extract frame, generate Jasmine in same pose, apply motion from original
types.primary_tool: Flux Kontext (frame → Jasmine image) + Wan 2.7 I2V + DW Pose (skeleton extraction)
types.backup_tool: Viggle AI (simpler, free 5/day — use pre-LoRA phase)
types.nsfw_version: Wan 2.7 local (no filter) — generate NSFW Jasmine start frame, then animate

types.name: Face Swap Reel
types.description: Swap Jasmine's face onto driving video with motion preserved

types.name: Talking Head / Direct-to-Camera
types.description: Jasmine speaks directly to camera — ElevenLabs produces the audio, video tools sync the face to it
types.audio: ElevenLabs — CONFIRMED. Produces .wav/.mp3 with emotion tags. Not under evaluation.
types.video_primary_tool: MuseTalk 1.5 (local or fal.ai API) — takes ElevenLabs audio as input, drives Jasmine's mouth movement
types.video_backup_tool: Wan S2V (hosted, SFW only) — also takes audio input
types.workflow: ElevenLabs (audio) → MuseTalk 1.5 (mouth sync on Jasmine frame) → CapCut (captions, final edit)
types.distribution_note: Meta SeamlessExpressive auto-dub available at 1000+ FB followers — not a production tool

types.name: GRWM / Outfit Transition
types.description: Multiple outfit changes with face lock between transitions
types.primary_tool: Flux Kontext (outfit images) + Wan VACE (transitions with face lock)
types.nsfw_version: Higgsfield Wan 2.6 (outfit to NSFW transition — web based)

types.name: Lifestyle / Travel UGC
types.description: Jasmine in travel locations — Goa, Himalaya, Bali, etc.
types.primary_tool: Google Veo 3.1 Fast / Flow (user already has via Google One)
types.nsfw_version: Not applicable — location content is SFW
types.cost_note: Veo 3.1 Fast already paid via Google One — zero additional cost

types.name: Trend Reaction (PiP)
types.description: Jasmine reaction box beside trending content
types.backup_tool: Viggle AI + manual CapCut PiP edit

types.name: Product Review / UGC
types.description: Jasmine holding and reviewing brand products
types.primary_tool: Seedance 2 via CapCut (best multi-reference product handling, free)
types.backup_tool: Flux Kontext (product in hand image) → Wan 2.7 I2V
types.nsfw_version: Not applicable — product content is SFW

types.name: Carousel (Static Multi-Image)
types.description: 4-8 slides, same Jasmine, same location, different poses
types.primary_tool_sfw: Flux Kontext 9B + Jasmine LoRA via Fal.ai
types.primary_tool_nsfw: Civitai Generate + Jasmine LoRA (NSFW) OR local ComfyUI
types.backup_tool_sfw: Google Imagen 3 ($0.03/image — no LoRA, SFW backgrounds only)

recommended_stack.scope_note: Audio = ElevenLabs (confirmed, locked). Stack below covers VIDEO and IMAGE only.
recommended_stack.audio_confirmed: ElevenLabs Starter $5/month — all voice, narration, emotion tags. Not under review.
recommended_stack.image_sfw: Flux Kontext 9B + Jasmine LoRA via Fal.ai
recommended_stack.image_nsfw: Civitai Generate + Jasmine LoRA  OR  local ComfyUI + Flux NSFW
recommended_stack.video_motion_transfer: Wan 2.7 I2V + DW Pose (local)  OR  Viggle AI (web, free 5/day)
recommended_stack.video_cinematic_sfw: Google Veo 3.1 Fast / Flow — already paid via Google One
recommended_stack.video_lip_sync: MuseTalk 1.5 — takes ElevenLabs audio as input, drives mouth movement on video
recommended_stack.future_distribution: Meta SeamlessExpressive — auto-dub Reels at 1000+ Facebook followers (not a production tool)

confirmed_audio.status: CONFIRMED — locked in, not under review

video_and_image_costs.higgsfield_basic: $9/month (~₹750) — NSFW video via Wan 2.6 (web, no GPU needed)
video_and_image_costs.google_veo_flow: ₹0 — already included in Google One — cinematic SFW B-roll
video_and_image_costs.musetalk_local: ₹0 — free (takes ElevenLabs audio as input, drives video lip sync)
video_and_image_costs.runpod_gpu_occasional: ~$1-2 per session (~₹85-170) — LoRA training and NSFW local runs

monthly_cost_breakdown.note: Civitai NSFW image generation requires crypto Buzz credits — variable, use sparingly. Primary NSFW image route is local ComfyUI on RunPod.

tools_dropped.reason: Went fully SFW in 2025 — previously allowed NSFW, now blocked. Core value proposition removed.
No LoRA, no video, fully blocked NSFW. Only useful for free SFW concept tests.
Platform-locked to Meta Reels. Cannot be used as a standalone lip sync tool. Re-categorised as a distribution feature at 1000+ followers.
No LoRA upload support. Cannot inject Jasmine's trained identity file. Every generation produces a random unknown face — not Jasmine. Character consistency is impossible. Rejected 2026-04-11.

No LoRA upload support. Same fundamental problem as Promptchan — no character consistency mechanism. Face swap feature does not preserve Jasmine identity across multiple images reliably. Rejected 2026-04-11.
AI companion/chat product — wrong use case entirely. Not an image generation pipeline tool. Rejected 2026-04-11.
All-in-one companion platform with no LoRA support. Cannot maintain Jasmine identity across generations. Rejected 2026-04-11.

No confirmed LoRA upload. Good for uncensored concept testing of new prompts but cannot maintain character consistency. Suitable only as a scratch-test tool before production. Not added to main stack. Rejected 2026-04-11.
No LoRA support, no character consistency. Useful only as a free zero-config scratch test. Not suitable for production pipeline. Rejected 2026-04-11.
AI companion product — not an image generation pipeline tool. Rejected 2026-04-11.

new_tools_added_2026_04_11.lora_notes: Supports LoRA upload on free tier — primary reason for inclusion
new_tools_added_2026_04_11.cost: Free tier sufficient for backup use
new_tools_added_2026_04_11.role: Backup NSFW image generator when Civitai on-site generation has crypto payment friction. Upload Jasmine LoRA, generate with NSFW checkpoint.
new_tools_added_2026_04_11.verdict: ADDED as backup to Civitai for on-site NSFW image generation with Jasmine LoRA

critical_prerequisite.note: Everything in this stack depends on this being done first

details.z_image_lora: ~40-50 training images, RunPod, ~$1-2 one-time cost. Unlocks character consistency in all static image generation.
details.wan_lora: ~40-50 training videos/frames, RunPod, ~$1-2 one-time cost. Unlocks face lock in Wan T2V video generation.
details.without_lora: Face swap quality is inconsistent. Wan T2V face lock does not work. Civitai/Tensor.art NSFW generation will not look like Jasmine. All content types degrade significantly.
details.priority: HIGHEST — block all content production until LoRA is trained
